title: Resolve, Directing the Department of Transportation to Place Signs on the Canal Bridge in the Town of Standish
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 5, 2026
last_house_action: 2/3/2026 - The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/5/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on TRANSPORTATION suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
